meta.title: HearMe — AI Speech Recognition for Speech Impairments
meta.desc: HearMe is a revolutionary AI-powered mobile app that provides personalized speech recognition for individuals with speech impairments.
meta.ogImageAlt: HearMe mobile app interface - AI speech recognition for people with speech impairments

@graph.name: HearMe
@graph.description: HearMe is a revolutionary AI-powered mobile app that provides personalized speech recognition for individuals with speech impairments (Cerebral Palsy, stroke, ALS).

offers.name: Full Plan
offers.description: Monthly subscription after a 1-month free trial.

@graph.name: Maksym Trineiev
@graph.description: Software Architect and ML specialist leading product strategy and R&D for assistive technologies.

@graph.name: Irina Oleynikova
@graph.description: Former general practitioner with expertise in clinical medicine and geriatric care, ensuring medical accuracy of AI algorithms.

hero.title:
Your Voice. Your Words.
Finally Understood.
hero.subtitle: HearMe is a revolutionary AI app that learns your unique speech patterns, giving you the power to communicate clearly and confidently.

features.title: Empowering Your Communication
features.subtitle: Designed for individuals with speech impairments from Cerebral Palsy, stroke, or ALS. HearMe combines advanced AI with an intuitive interface.
features.personal_desc: The app trains on your specific voice patterns using advanced Machine Learning, becoming more accurate with every use.
features.recognition_desc: Our AI instantly transcribes your speech into text with low latency, enabling seamless and natural conversation flows.
features.output_desc: Play your recognized phrase aloud using clear synthesis, copy the text to clipboard, or send it directly to other apps.
features.fallback_desc: Recognition uncertain? Instantly select a saved phrase directly on screen. Speak, copy, or share it seamlessly—just like voice input.
features.translation_desc: Break down language barriers. Instantly translate your thoughts to communicate in the most common foreign languages.
features.secure_desc: Your voice is yours alone. We apply the same level of encryption and security used by modern banking apps.

howItWorks.title: Your Journey to Clear Speech
howItWorks.subtitle: Getting started is easy. Our step-by-step process ensures the AI adapts to you immediately.
howItWorks.step1_desc: No downloads or app stores required. Simply open HearMe directly in your browser to get started instantly on any device.
howItWorks.step2_desc: Train 5 predefined phrases by recording multiple voice samples for each. This builds a robust baseline model tailored specifically to your speech patterns.
howItWorks.step3_desc: In the full version, you will be able to add custom phrases specific to your life, making the AI smarter and more personalized.
howItWorks.step4_desc: Use the app to speak for you in real-time. Whether text-to-speech or text display, your voice is finally understood.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your needs. Start for free and upgrade as you grow.
pricing.basic_desc: Perfect for getting started with essential communication tools.
pricing.full_desc: Unlock the full power of personalized AI speech recognition.
pricing.notify_text: Get notified when Full becomes available.
pricing.feat_roadmap: Access to all Roadmap features

roadmap.title: The Future of HearMe
roadmap.subtitle: Our mission goes beyond screens. We are working to integrate HearMe into every aspect of your life, removing barriers in both the digital and physical worlds.
roadmap.item1_desc: Make crystal-clear calls directly within the HearMe app. Connect with friends and family effortlessly, with our AI ensuring your voice is heard perfectly on the other end.
roadmap.item2_desc: Use your personalized voice model to dictate text in any app, directly from your system keyboard.
roadmap.item3_desc: Enhance Siri or Google Assistant with your personalized HearMe model. Control your smart home and devices reliably using the assistants you already know.
roadmap.item4_desc: A future wearable device that works entirely offline. It speaks your words clearly in any language, serving as your personal voice bridge—speech-to-speech, anywhere.

culture.title: Our Cultural Code
culture.subtitle: We are guided by the HEAR framework: four core values that drive our mission to give everyone a voice.
culture.val_h_li1: With users: we are transparent about how our AI works, its capabilities, and its limitations.
culture.val_h_li2: With our team: we build a culture of open feedback where the best idea wins, not the job title.
culture.val_h_li3: With investors: we communicate honestly about our challenges and struggles, just as we do our wins.
culture.val_e_li1: For our clients: we work with a deeply vulnerable audience where every word matters.
culture.val_e_li2: For our partners: they help us scale our impact and make the world a better place.
culture.val_e_li3: For our colleagues: the best ideas are born in an atmosphere of mutual respect and support.
culture.val_a_li1: For product quality: we never compromise when it comes to recognition accuracy and UX.
culture.val_a_li2: For learning: the AI field evolves rapidly, and we strive to always stay one step ahead.
culture.val_a_li3: For innovation: we tackle extreme challenges to push the boundaries of speech technology.
culture.val_r_li1: For privacy: the absolute protection of our users' voice data is our unconditional priority.
culture.val_r_li2: For accessibility: we build a product that must work flawlessly for everyone, regardless of circumstances.
culture.val_r_li3: For outcomes: we realize that a person's ability to communicate and connect depends on our work.

team.title: Team & Advisors
team.subtitle: HearMe is backed by a team of experts in Machine Learning, medicine, and business, united by a single goal — to give everyone a voice.
team.founder_bio: With deep expertise as a Software Architect and ML specialist, Maksym leads product strategy and R&D. His core focus is bridging advanced AI with assistive technologies to make communication accessible to everyone.
team.advisor_med_bio: With her background as a general practitioner experienced in clinical medicine, diagnostic services and long-term geriatric care, Irina ensures that our algorithms accurately address the real medical and daily needs of users with speech impairments.
team.advisor_biz_bio: Specializing in SaaS scaling and business strategy, Mykhailo helps HearMe build a sustainable business model for successful expansion into international markets.
team.advisor_tech_bio: Bringing years of experience in AI architecture, Vitalii advises the team on optimizing complex Machine Learning models to guarantee instant, low-latency speech recognition.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Have questions or suggestions? We'd love to hear from you.
contact.success_desc: Thanks for reaching out. We'll get back to you shortly.
contact.error_generic: Failed to send message. Please check your connection.

waitlist.meta_desc: Join the waitlist for HearMe, a revolutionary AI-powered mobile app for personalized speech recognition.
waitlist.title: Join the Waitlist
waitlist.subtitle: Be the first to experience personalized speech recognition. <br class='hidden md:inline'> Sign up for early access and updates.
waitlist.privacy: We respect your privacy. No spam, ever.
waitlist.success_desc: Thank you for joining HearMe. We'll be in touch soon with your invitation for early access.

footer.desc: Giving everyone the power to be heard.

maintenance.title: We'll be back soon!
maintenance.desc: Sorry for the inconvenience. We're currently performing scheduled maintenance to improve our website. We'll be back online shortly.

investors.meta_desc: Invest in the future of speech accessibility. HearMe is raising Pre-seed to accelerate R&D and market expansion.
investors.title: Invest in the Voice of the Future
investors.subtitle: We are raising Pre-seed investment to accelerate R&D and expand our Edge AI speech restoration technology into Ukraine, Europe, and the USA.
investors.video_desc: A brief overview of HearMe's main goals, our mission, and why now is the perfect time to invest.
investors.video_placeholder: English video pitch is coming soon...
investors.deck_mission_desc: 70M+ people live in 'silent isolation' due to severe speech impairments from CP, stroke, or ALS. We are restoring their fundamental human right to be understood
investors.deck_problem_b2: Existing assistive tools are $5k+ hardware, privacy-invasive, or too laggy
investors.deck_solution_desc: Edge AI mobile app translates atypical speech in real-time
investors.deck_market_b3: Organic Signal leads with $0 marketing spend
investors.deck_expertise_desc: Built by an ex-EPAM Engineering lead with a strong Math background and 10+ years of experience, backed by a team of medical, business, and ML experts
investors.dataroom_desc: Access our full set of documents, including the Pitch Deck, financial models, and technical roadmap on Google Drive. Access available upon request.
